mapper.select:
WITH pair_attacks AS ( -- 双方（A打B + B打A）在时间区间内的所有战斗，用于判定“3分钟内是否>=minBattleCount” SELECT fa.attack_end_time FROM torn_faction_attack fa WHERE fa.deleted = 0 AND fa.attack_end_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND ( (fa.attack_faction_id = #{factionId} AND fa.defend_faction_id = #{opponentFactionId}) OR (fa.attack_faction_id = #{opponentFactionId} AND fa.defend_faction_id = #{factionId}) ) ), anchor_points AS ( -- 以每个发生过战斗的时刻作为“滑动窗口右边界” SELECT DISTINCT pa.attack_end_time FROM pair_attacks pa ), qualified_points AS ( -- 任意连续 windowMinutes 分钟内，双方总战斗数 >= minBattleCount 的窗口右边界 SELECT ap.attack_end_time AS window_end FROM anchor_points ap JOIN pair_attacks pa ON pa.attack_end_time >= ap.attack_end_time - (CAST(#{windowMinutes} AS TEXT) || ' minutes')::INTERVAL AND pa.attack_end_time <= ap.attack_end_time GROUP BY ap.attack_end_time HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minBattleCount} ), qualified_attacks AS ( -- 统计对象仍是“我方打对方”的战斗记录，但仅保留落在命中窗口里的记录 SELECT fa.attack_user_id, fa.attack_user_nickname, fa.attack_result, fa.defend_user_online_status, fa.defender_elo, fa.attack_log_id, fa.attack_start_time, fa.attack_end_time, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (fa.attack_end_time - fa.attack_start_time))::INTEGER AS combat_duration FROM torn_faction_attack fa WHERE fa.deleted = 0 AND fa.attack_faction_id = #{factionId} AND fa.defend_faction_id = #{opponentFactionId} AND fa.attack_end_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM qualified_points qp WHERE fa.attack_end_time >= qp.window_end - (CAST(#{windowMinutes} AS TEXT) || ' minutes')::INTERVAL AND fa.attack_end_time <= qp.window_end ) ), qualified_users AS ( SELECT DISTINCT qa.attack_user_id FROM qualified_attacks qa ), player_attack_stats AS ( SELECT qa.attack_user_id, qa.attack_user_nickname, COUNT(*) AS total_attacks, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE qa.attack_result = 'Hospitalized') AS hosp_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE qa.attack_result IN ('Attacked', 'Special', 'Arrested', 'Mugged')) AS leave_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE qa.attack_result = 'Assist') AS assist_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE qa.attack_result IN ('Lost', 'Escape', 'Timeout', 'Stalemate', 'Interrupted')) AS lost_count, SUM(qa.combat_duration) AS total_combat_duration, ROUND(AVG(qa.combat_duration)::NUMERIC, 2) AS avg_combat_duration, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE qa.defend_user_online_status = 'Online') AS online_opponent_count, ROUND((AVG(qa.defender_elo) FILTER (WHERE qa.defender_elo IS NOT NULL))::NUMERIC, 2) AS avg_opponent_elo FROM qualified_attacks qa GROUP BY qa.attack_user_id, qa.attack_user_nickname ), qualified_logs AS ( -- 先按命中窗口 + 相关用户做日志裁剪 SELECT al.id, al.log_id, al.attacker_id, al.defender_id, al.log_action, al.damage, al.defender_elo, al.syringe_type, al.ammo_type, al.attacker_item_name, al.log_time FROM torn_attack_log al WHERE al.deleted = 0 AND al.log_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM qualified_points qp WHERE al.log_time >= qp.window_end - (CAST(#{windowMinutes} AS TEXT) || ' minutes')::INTERVAL AND al.log_time <= qp.window_end ) AND ( al.attacker_id IN (SELECT qu.attack_user_id FROM qualified_users qu) OR al.defender_id IN (SELECT qu.attack_user_id FROM qualified_users qu) ) ), log_stats AS ( SELECT ql.attacker_id AS attack_user_id, COUNT(*) FILTER ( WHERE ql.log_action IN ('busy', 'critical hit', 'hit', 'missed', 'onItemUseEff', 'reload', 'specialTemp', 'specialTempI', 'won') ) AS total_rounds, COALESCE(SUM(ql.damage), 0) AS damage_dealt, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN ql.defender_elo IS NOT NULL AND ql.defender_elo > 0 THEN ((ql.defender_elo - 1000) / 1000.0) * ql.damage ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS damage_score, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ql.syringe_type IS NOT NULL) AS syringe_used, COUNT(ql.log_id) FILTER (WHERE ql.ammo_type IS NOT NULL) AS special_ammo_rounds, COUNT(*) FILTER ( WHERE ql.attacker_item_name IN ('Smoke Grenade', 'Flash Grenade', 'Tear Gas', 'Pepper Spray') ) AS debuff_temp_count FROM qualified_logs ql JOIN qualified_users qu ON qu.attack_user_id = ql.attacker_id GROUP BY ql.attacker_id ), defender_stats AS ( SELECT ql.defender_id AS attack_user_id, COALESCE(SUM(ql.damage), 0) AS damage_taken FROM qualified_logs ql JOIN qualified_users qu ON qu.attack_user_id = ql.defender_id GROUP BY ql.defender_id )
SELECT pas.attack_user_id AS user_id, pas.attack_user_nickname AS nickname, pas.total_attacks, pas.hosp_count, pas.leave_count, pas.assist_count, pas.lost_count, pas.total_combat_duration, pas.avg_combat_duration, pas.online_opponent_count, pas.avg_opponent_elo, COALESCE(ls.total_rounds, 0) AS total_rounds, COALESCE(ls.damage_dealt, 0) AS damage_dealt, COALESCE(ds.damage_taken, 0) AS damage_taken, COALESCE(ls.damage_score, 0) * (CASE WHEN pas.total_attacks = 0 THEN 0 ELSE pas.online_opponent_count::NUMERIC / pas.total_attacks END) AS damage_score, COALESCE(ls.syringe_used, 0) AS syringe_used, COALESCE(ls.special_ammo_rounds, 0) AS special_ammo_rounds, COALESCE(ls.debuff_temp_count, 0) AS debuff_temp_count FROM player_attack_stats pas LEFT JOIN log_stats ls ON pas.attack_user_id = ls.attack_user_id LEFT JOIN defender_stats ds ON pas.attack_user_id = ds.attack_user_id ORDER BY damage_score DESC
